destinations.name: Meeting intelligence
destinations.authority_basis: Explicit provider and Runs on selection
destinations.background_ability: Deferred jobs may retry while HoldSpeak runs
destinations.revoke_action: Set meeting intelligence to local or disable it

destinations.name: Dictation intelligence
destinations.data_class: Final dictation text and selected context
destinations.authority_basis: Enabled pipeline and Runs on selection
destinations.background_ability: Only runs for an explicit dictation request
destinations.revoke_action: Choose an on-device runtime or disable the pipeline

destinations.name: Slack
destinations.data_class: The exact previewed digest or card text
destinations.revoke_action: Delete the Slack secret in Settings

destinations.name: Custom webhook
destinations.revoke_action: Delete the custom webhook secret in Settings

destinations.name: GitHub issues
destinations.boundary: The configured repository through local gh
destinations.data_class: The exact previewed issue title and body
destinations.revoke_action: Clear the repository or log out of gh

destinations.name: Telegram control
destinations.operation: Receive paired commands and send responses
destinations.data_class: Commands, status, and explicitly requested output
destinations.authority_basis: Configured bot token and pairing policy
destinations.background_ability: May receive commands while the bot is enabled
destinations.revoke_action: Delete the Telegram bot token in Settings

destinations.name: Failure alerts
destinations.data_class: Queue counts and failure rates; never transcript text
destinations.background_ability: May send after sustained deferred-job failures
destinations.revoke_action: Delete the failure webhook secret in Settings
